name: x-heat
description: Chrome/Edge extension that shows a heat score on X posts.

scripts.test: node --check src/content.js && node --check popup/popup.js && node --check tests/smoke.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('manifest.json','utf8')); const files=[...(manifest.content_scripts||[]).flatMap((script)=>[...(script.js||[]),...(script.css||[])]),manifest.action&&manifest.action.default_popup].filter(Boolean); for (const file of files) { if (!fs.existsSync(file)) throw new Error('missing '+file); } console.log('manifest refs ok: '+files.join(', '));" && node tests/smoke.js
